Access drug "street names" online

November 1994
Crime & JusticeInvestigative Methods

The Drugs and Crime Data Center has published an online document containing over 1,500 street terms related to drugs and drug trade activities, accessible via FTP.

The Drugs and Crime Data Center and Clearinghouse has made its document "Street Terms: Drugs and the Drug Trade" available online. The document contains more than 1,500 street terms that refer to specific drug types or drug activity, from "A" (LSD or amphetamines) to "Zoomers" (individuals who sell fake crack then flee). To access the document via the net, FTP For source information, contact the DCDCC at (800) 666-3332.
